cit.basis: ISR (Impuesto sobre la Renta) under the Ley de Impuesto sobre la Renta (LISR): 30% standard; 25% for companies with taxable income up to USD 150,000. Whole-base (cliff) rate, not a progressive bracket.

minimum_tax.note: 1% minimum tax on gross income (2011/2014 reforms) declared unconstitutional by the Constitutional Chamber in 2015; not applied. Historical note only.

cit.note: Administered by the Ministerio de Hacienda / Direccion General de Impuestos Internos (DGII).

vat.note: IVA (Impuesto a la Transferencia de Bienes Muebles y a la Prestacion de Servicios) at 13%; exports zero-rated.

wht.note: General 20% withholding on payments to non-residents (25% to low/no-tax jurisdictions); rates vary by income type.

social_insurance.note: ISSS health/social security plus AFP pension contributions; contribution ceilings apply; simplified.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
The 25% reduced rate applies to the WHOLE base when taxable income is at most USD 150,000 (cliff, not bracket).
Pago a cuenta advance payments, exemptions, free-zone regimes, relief, and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
